untranslatable_reason: Black candle color detection requires explicit color classification not available in allowed indicators (only price, volume, and derived technical indicators provided). The pattern requires identifying candlestick color (black/red vs white/green) which cannot be reliably inferred from OHLC data alone without additional color metadata.
translation_notes: Translated shadow and body constraints using upper_wick, lower_wick, and body indicators. Entry conditions check: body exists (>0), upper shadow < body height, lower shadow < body height. Applied to both long and short entries since direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT. Exit conditions use reversal logic (breakout beyond previous candle extremes). Color condition (black candle) cannot be translated with available indicators.
